cases.S: A Reel-to-Reel package inspection machine had 'slip' errors.
cases.T: Troubleshoot winder synchronization without damaging tape.
cases.A: Retuned Trio Motion PID loops and added ramped torque limits.
cases.R: Achieved 100% successful engagement, zero tape snapping.
